title: Update on the 2024 Call for Proposals - Canada.ca
content:
## Update on the 2024 Call for Proposals
Ottawa, October, 17, 2024 —We are finalizing the suite of projects resulting from the 2024 Call for Proposals – archived . We will send letters to applicants this fall after the Multi-Year Immigration Levels Plan is announced.
Our priority is ensuring that newcomers have access to core Settlement and Resettlement Assistance Program services. We aim to have agreements in place by April 1, 2025.
If you have questions, contact us at cfp-adp@cic.gc.ca
